# UC-22.6.58 · ISO/IEC 27001 A.8.20 — Cisco ISE Network Segregation Matrix Drift Evidence

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence ISO 27001 A.8.20 (network segregation) by checking the segmentation matrix against the approved baseline daily. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence ISO 27001 A.8.20 (network segregation) by detecting any drift in the ISE TrustSec / GBP segmentation matrix.

## Value

Segmentation drift is an insidious erosion of A.8.20. Daily baseline comparison turns operational change-detection into audit-grade evidence with attribution.

## Implementation

Daily schedule. Baseline must be checked into version control with an approved-by attribution.

## Evidence

Saved search results archived to `audit_evidence` with ISO 27001 A.8.20 tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Modify a single SGT-matrix cell. UC-22.6.58 logs drift evidence next day.

### Negative scenario

No drift. Empty evidence set; A.8.20 attestation held.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.76 deployed. Lookups present.
- Baseline `ise_sgt_matrix_baseline.csv` checked into Git with approved-by metadata.

## Step 1 — Data

Daily OpenAPI export script populates `ise_sgt_matrix.csv`.

## Step 2 — Implementation

```ini
[UC-22.6.58: ISO 27001 A.8.20 — ISE Segmentation Matrix Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -1m
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.6.58,reg=ISO27001,clause=A.8.20
```

## Step 3 — Validate

Deliberately introduce a drift cell, confirm UC-22.6.58 captures it within 24h.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

A.8.20 dashboard with drift count panel and current vs. baseline matrix viewer.

## Step 5 — Audit submission

Monthly evidence pack with attestation that baseline was updated only via the change board.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup ise_sgt_matrix.csv
| join type=outer source_sgt destination_sgt [| inputlookup ise_sgt_matrix_baseline.csv | rename action as baseline_action]
| eval drift=if(action!=baseline_action, "DRIFTED", "ok")
| where drift=="DRIFTED"
| eval iso27001_clause="A.8.20", control="Network_Segregation"
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

A.8.20 panel: drift cell timeline; current vs. baseline matrix.

## Known False Positives

1. Baseline pending update during planned segmentation change — coordinate with policy engineering and update baseline post-CAB.

## References

- [ISO/IEC 27001:2022](https://www.iso.org/standard/27001)
- [UC-17.1.76 — ISE Group-Based Policy (GBP) Effective-Policy Drift](../cat-17-network-security-zero-trust/UC-17.1.76.json)
